name: Shamino
answer2:
That which
lies within
the codex!
question:
Dost thou seek
this "truth"?
yes:
Some things take
forever but
brick by brick
mountains can be
built!

name: Emerson
answer1:
Spiritual is
stronger than
any material
force.
answer2:
Nothing can
bring thee peace
but the triumph
of principles!
question:
Art thou good
in spirit?

name: Santayana
job:
I carry the
light within my
heart.
answer2:
In philosophical
minds the
familiar excites
wonder!
question:
Dost thou always
tread the right
path?
no:
Few can, but
strive to do so!

name: Presto
answer1:
I can cast:
jinx, kill,
and view!
answer2:
Yes, ask the
barkeep at
'The Axe-n-Ale'
in Vesper about
nightshade.
question:
Dost thou know
what these
spells have in
common?

name: Granted
job:
I beg for food
and money.
health:
I am not
at all well.
question:
Wilt thou give
me food or
money?
yes:
In return I will
tell thee that
the ankh knows
of the rune and
my friend Ambule
knows the
mantra!

name: Mitre
job:
I am reading the
wizard's journal.
answer1:
It tells of the
white stone.
answer2:
It is no longer
in the dungeon
Hythloth, it
is gone!
question:
Wilt thou try to
recover it?
yes:
Ask of the stone
at the Tap in
Trinsic!

name: Buddha
answer1:
When one has
pity on all
living creatures
then is one
noble.
answer2:
If one speaks or
acts with pure
thought,
happiness will
follow like a
shadow that
never leaves.
question: A

name: Michaelangelo
answer1:
Success is a
journey, not a
destination.
answer2:
May thou always
desire more than
thou can
accomplish!
question:
Art thou far
along the path?

name: Romasco
look:
A short dumpy
man with a book.
job:
I am a teacher,
I enrich young
minds.
answer2:
Seek Zair the
Wise in Paws for
more on the
word.
question:
Know ye of
the abyss?
yes:
A word of
passage is
needed at the
last gate!

name: Carlyle
answer1:
One lives by
believing in
something.
answer2:
Great
discoveries are
made by those
whose feelings
run ahead of
their thinking.
question:
Dost thou
believe in
magic?
yes:
Magic missiles
need but 1
part ash!

name: Dickens
answer1:
Stories are good
for the spirit!
answer2:
Remember,
no one is
useless in this
world who
lightens the
burdens of
others!
question:
Art thou good
in nature?
yes:
Be sure thy net
good well
exceeds thy
net evil!

name: White
answer2:
I am not afraid
of tomorrow; I
have seen
yesterday and I
love today.
question:
Art thou
fearless in all
thing?

name:
the Ankh of
Spirituality
job:
I keep the
secret of
the rune.
answer2:
Search for
the rune of
spirituality in
the treasure
chamber of
Britannia!
question:
Hast thou found
the shrine?
no:
Enter the gate
of full moons!

name: Ambule
job:
I beg for but
for a single
gold piece!
question:
Wilt thou please
give me a
gold piece?
no:
Stingy, I know
thou hast many!

name: Barren
answer1:
I know it well,
it is 'OM'.
question: A

name: Isaac
answer2:
The white stone
sits atop the
Serpent's Spine.
It can only be
reached by one
who floats
within the
clouds.
question:
Art thou on
the quest?
